title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at IIFL Finance
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
